nodes.label: RSSI Unreliability Finding for Indoor Localization
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Evaluation of the reliability of RSSI for indoor localization : 2012 International Conferen.pdf
nodes.rationale: Experimental calibration mapping RSSI to distance shows unacceptably high errors in indoor WSN environments, motivating use of CSI or fingerprinting rather than pure range estimation from RSSI.
